chosen.theme: US Crypto Regulatory Clarity — SEC-CFTC MoU Resolves Jurisdictional Overlap, Completing Institutional Adoption Precondition Stack

candidates.news_one_liner: Ekubo Protocol's $1.4M EVM router exploit reinforces institutional preference for audited custody over permissionless DeFi, pressuring ETH and BTC DeFi sentiment.

candidates.theme: Bitcoin Custodial Censorship-Resistance Myth — US Seizure of Iranian Crypto Assets Proves State Actors Can Restrict BTC Access at Scale
candidates.news_one_liner: US seizure of Iranian crypto proves custodied Bitcoin can be frozen by state actors, undermining BTC's safe-haven premium and boosting privacy coin demand.

candidates.theme: Privacy Coin Institutional Surge — Multicoin Capital ZEC Disclosure and 70% Rally Signal Emerging Demand Bifurcation Between Transparent and Anonymous Crypto Rails
candidates.news_one_liner: US seizure of Iranian BTC and Tether's $515M freeze provide back-to-back proof that custodied crypto can be censored, supercharging ZEC's privacy-demand thesis.

candidates.theme: Moscow Exchange Altcoin Index Expansion — MOEX Benchmark Suite Addition Signals Emerging Market Institutional Crypto Recognition Beyond BTC/ETH
candidates.news_one_liner: MOEX adding SOL, TRX, BNB, XRP to its benchmark suite creates structured institutional demand in Russia, broadening altcoin adoption beyond Western markets.

candidates.news_one_liner: Capital B's €114M potential BTC capacity and record-low short interest in crypto equities confirm corporate treasury model expansion into Europe with reduced bearish pushback.
